[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100 1
1 1111111 a
2 1101001 4
3 1110100 4
4 0111011 5
5 0011101 4
6 0000000 a
7 0001110 3

01 10 1111111 a match 1
12 21 0111111 6
23 32 0011101 4 match 5
34 43 0001110 3 match 7
45 54 1101110 5
56 65 1111111 a match 1
67 76 1111111 a match 1
70 07 1111101 6

13 31 0111011 5 match 4

35 53 1100100 3
46 64 1111111 a match 1

71 17 1111011 6

61 16 1111111 a match 1
72 27 1111101 6

15 51 1111111 a match 1

37 73 1101001 4 match 2
